memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u16 Addr, u16 *Val)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_DrpAccess

briefdescription.para: This function will initiate a DRP transaction (either read or write).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID on which to direct the DRP access.
is an indicator for write (TX) or read (RX).
is the DRP address to issue the DRP access to.
is a pointer to the data value. In write mode, this pointer will hold the value to write. In read mode, this pointer will be populated with the read value.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the DRP access was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise, if the busy bit did not go low, or if the ready bit did not go high.

simplesect.para: In read mode (Dir == XHDMIPHY1_DIR_RX), the data pointed to by Val will be populated with the u16 value that was read._

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, XHdmiphy1_Config *ConfigPtr, UINTPTR EffectiveAddr)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_CfgInitialize

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves the configuration for this Video PHY instance and fills in the InstancePtr->Config structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
is a pointer to the configuration structure that will be used to copy the settings from.
is the device base address in the virtual memory space. If the address translation is not used, then the physical address is passed.

simplesect.para: Unexpected errors may occur if the address mapping is changed after this function is invoked.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_PllRefClkSelType QpllRefClkSel, XHdmiphy1_PllRefClkSelType CpllRefClkSel, XHdmiphy1_PllType TxPllSelect, XHdmiphy1_PllType RxPllSelect)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_PllInitialize

briefdescription.para: This function will initialize the PLL selection for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the QPLL reference clock selection for the quad.
is the CPLL reference clock selection for the quad.
is the reference clock selection for the quad's TX PLL dividers.
is the reference clock selection for the quad's RX PLL dividers.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, XHdmiphy1_TimerHandler CallbackFunc, void *CallbackRef)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetUserTimerHandler

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u32 MicroSeconds)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_WaitUs

briefdescription.para: This function is the delay/sleep function for the XHdmiphy1 driver.

detaileddescription.para: For the Zynq family, there exists native sleep functionality. For MicroBlaze however, there does not exist such functionality. In the MicroBlaze case, the default method for delaying is to use a predetermined amount of loop iterations. This method is prone to inaccuracy and dependent on system configuration; for greater accuracy, the user may supply their own delay/sleep handler, pointed to by InstancePtr->UserTimerWaitUs, which may have better accuracy if a hardware timer is used.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
is the number of microseconds to delay/sleep for.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_GetVersion

briefdescription.para: This function will obtian the IP version.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.

simplesect.para: The IP version of the Video PHY core.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u64 LineRateHz)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_CfgLineRate

briefdescription.para: Configure the channel's line rate.

detaileddescription.para: This is a software only configuration and this value is used in the PLL calculator.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the line rate to configure software.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the reference clock type is valid.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_GetPllType

briefdescription.para: Obtain the channel's PLL reference clock selection.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is the channel ID which to operate on.

simplesect.para: The PLL type being used by the channel.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_GetLineRateHz

briefdescription.para: This function will return the line rate in Hz for a given channel / quad.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to check.
is the channel ID for which to retrieve the line rate.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_ResetGtPll

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the GT's PLL logic.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the reset if set to 1. If set to 0: reset, then enable.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_ResetGtTxRx

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the GT's TX/RX logic.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the reset if set to 1. If set to 0: reset, then enable.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Polarity)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetPolarity

briefdescription.para: This function will set/clear the TX/RX polarity bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
0-Not inverted 1-Inverted

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, XHdmiphy1_PrbsPattern Pattern)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetPrbsSel

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX/RXPRBSEL of the GT.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is the pattern XHdmiphy1_PrbsPattern

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u8 ForceErr)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_TxPrbsForceError

briefdescription.para: This function will force an error in the TX PRBS pattern for the GT.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
0-No Error 1-Force Error

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u8 Vs)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetTxVoltageSwing

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX voltage swing value for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the voltage swing value to write.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u8 Pe)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetTxPreEmphasis

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX pre-emphasis value for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the pre-emphasis value to write.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u8 Pc)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetTxPostCursor

briefdescription.para: This function will set the TX post-cursor value for a given channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the post-cursor value to write.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetRxLpm

briefdescription.para: This function will enable or disable the LPM logic in the Video PHY core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
will enable (if 1) or disable (if 0) the LPM logic.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u16 Addr, u16 Val)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_DrpWr

briefdescription.para: This function will initiate a write DRP transaction.

detaileddescription.para: It is a wrapper around XHdmiphy1_DrpAccess.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID on which to direct the DRP access.
is the DRP address to issue the DRP access to.
is the value to write to the DRP address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the DRP access was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise, if the busy bit did not go low, or if the ready bit did not go high.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_ChannelId ChId, u16 Addr, u16 *RetVal)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_DrpRd

briefdescription.para: This function will initiate a read DRP transaction.

detaileddescription.para: It is a wrapper around XHdmiphy1_DrpAccess.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID on which to direct the DRP access.
is the DRP address to issue the DRP access to.
is the DRP read_value returned implicitly.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the DRP access was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise, if the busy bit did not go low, or if the ready bit did not go high.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_MmcmPowerDown

briefdescription.para: This function will power down the mixed-mode clock manager (MMCM) core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the power down if set to 1. If set to 0: power down, then power back up.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_MmcmStart

briefdescription.para: This function will start the mixed-mode clock manager (MMCM) core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_IBufDsEnable

briefdescription.para: This function enables the TX or RX IBUFDS peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the IBUFDS, respectively.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, XHdmiphy1_DirectionType Dir, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_Clkout1OBufTdsEnable

briefdescription.para: This function enables the TX or RX CLKOUT1 OBUFTDS peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 core instance.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
specifies TRUE/FALSE value to either enable or disable the OBUFTDS, respectively.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, void *CallbackFunc, void *CallbackRef)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetErrorCallback

briefdescription.para: This function installs a callback function for the HDMIPHY error conditions.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
CallbackFunc
is the address to the callback function.
CallbackRef
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.
None.
The XHdmiphy1_ErrorHandler API calls the registered function in ErrorCallback and passes two arguments: 1) CallbackRef 2) Error Type as defined by XHdmiphy1_ErrType. Sample Function Call: CallbackFunc(CallbackRef, XHdmiphy1_ErrType);

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr, u64 *CallbackFunc, void *CallbackRef)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_SetLogCallback

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the LogWrite API:

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdmiphy1 instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

memberdef.argsstring: (XHdmiphy1 *InstancePtr)
memberdef.name: XHdmiphy1_RegisterDebug

briefdescription.para: This function prints out Video PHY register and GT Channel and Common DRP register contents.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Hdmiphy core instance.

briefdescription.para: Contains a minimal set of functions for the XHdmiphy1 driver that allow access to all of the Video PHY core's functionality.

detaileddescription.para: See xhdmiphy1.h for a detailed description of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
dd/mm/yy
1.0 gm 10/12/18 Initial release. 1.1 ku 17/05/20 Adding uniquification to avoid clash with vphy 1.1 ku 27/07/20 Removed GTHE3 related code 1.2 ssh 22/07/22 Added multi gt support and updated the frl and dru clk freq to 200MHz for -1 GTHE4 and GTYE4 device 1.3 ssh 18/10/22 Updated the extended txdiffctrl mask and added support for NI-DRU disabled case 1.4 ssh 10/09/24 Added DPLL clock primitive support for Versal
